description: Benchmark Abritel ↔ Airbnb ↔ Booking : note moyenne, volume, distribution catégories, persona, source.

targets.rawSql: SELECT b.label AS marque, AVG(r.rating)::numeric(10,2) AS note FROM marts.fact_reviews r JOIN marts.dim_brand b ON b.id=r.brand_id WHERE r.is_exploitable=TRUE GROUP BY b.label ORDER BY note DESC;

WITH src_brand AS (SELECT b.label AS marque, src.label AS source, COUNT(*) AS n FROM marts.fact_reviews r JOIN marts.dim_brand b ON b.id=r.brand_id JOIN marts.dim_source src ON src.id=r.source_id WHERE r.is_exploitable=TRUE GROUP BY 1,2) SELECT marque, MAX(CASE WHEN source='Trustpilot' THEN n ELSE 0 END) AS "Trustpilot", MAX(CASE WHEN source='Google Play' THEN n ELSE 0 END) AS "Google Play", MAX(CASE WHEN source='App Store' THEN n ELSE 0 END) AS "App Store" FROM src_brand GROUP BY marque ORDER BY marque;

WITH per_brand AS (SELECT b.label AS marque, SUM(CASE WHEN sev.code='high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS pct_high FROM marts.fact_reviews r JOIN marts.fact_classifications fc ON fc.review_id=r.id JOIN marts.dim_severity sev ON sev.id=fc.severity_id JOIN marts.dim_brand b ON b.id=r.brand_id WHERE r.is_exploitable=TRUE GROUP BY 1) SELECT marque, pct_high FROM per_brand ORDER BY marque;

panels.title: Catégories par marque (volume)
panels.description: Stacked bar : pour chaque marque, répartition des avis par catégorie.

targets.rawSql: WITH cb AS (SELECT b.label AS marque, c.label AS category, COUNT(*) AS n FROM marts.fact_reviews r JOIN marts.fact_classifications fc ON fc.review_id=r.id JOIN marts.dim_brand b ON b.id=r.brand_id JOIN marts.dim_category c ON c.id=fc.category_id WHERE r.is_exploitable=TRUE GROUP BY 1,2), pivoted AS (SELECT marque FROM cb GROUP BY 1) SELECT p.marque, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN cb.category='Localisation / Langue' THEN cb.n END),0) AS "Localisation / Langue", COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN cb.category='Transparence financière' THEN cb.n END),0) AS "Transparence financière", COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN cb.category='Fiabilité réservations' THEN cb.n END),0) AS "Fiabilité réservations", COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN cb.category='Service client' THEN cb.n END),0) AS "Service client", COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN cb.category='Qualité des annonces' THEN cb.n END),0) AS "Qualité des annonces", COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN cb.category='Parcours paiement' THEN cb.n END),0) AS "Parcours paiement", COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN cb.category='Communication hôte' THEN cb.n END),0) AS "Communication hôte", COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN cb.category='Non classé' THEN cb.n END),0) AS "Non classé" FROM pivoted p LEFT JOIN cb ON cb.marque=p.marque GROUP BY p.marque ORDER BY p.marque;

panels.title: Personas par marque
panels.description: Locataire vs propriétaire — répartition des avis exploitables par marque.

targets.rawSql: WITH bp AS (SELECT b.label AS marque, p.label AS persona, COUNT(*) AS n FROM marts.fact_reviews r JOIN marts.dim_brand b ON b.id=r.brand_id JOIN marts.dim_persona p ON p.id=r.persona_id WHERE r.is_exploitable=TRUE GROUP BY 1,2) SELECT marque, MAX(CASE WHEN persona='Locataire' THEN n ELSE 0 END) AS "Locataire", MAX(CASE WHEN persona='Propriétaire' THEN n ELSE 0 END) AS "Propriétaire", MAX(CASE WHEN persona='Indéterminé' THEN n ELSE 0 END) AS "Indéterminé" FROM bp GROUP BY marque ORDER BY marque;

panels.title: Note moyenne par marque (rolling 7j)
panels.description: Lissage sur 7 jours pour éviter le bruit des petits volumes journaliers.

targets.rawSql: WITH daily AS (SELECT date_trunc('day', r.review_date)::date AS d, b.label AS brand_label, AVG(r.rating)::float AS avg_rating FROM marts.fact_reviews r JOIN marts.dim_brand b ON b.id=r.brand_id WHERE r.is_exploitable=TRUE AND $__timeFilter(r.review_date) GROUP BY 1, 2) SELECT d::timestamptz AS time, brand_label AS metric, AVG(avg_rating) OVER (PARTITION BY brand_label ORDER BY d ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric(10,2) AS value FROM daily ORDER BY 1, 2;

title: VoC — Brand Comparison
